executives.name: Stephen Parsons
executives.background: Mr Parsons is an experienced geologist and mining executive. He was previously the Managing Director of Gryphon Minerals.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin Tomlinson
board_of_directors.background: Mr Tomlinson is a highly experienced mining executive and investment banker with over 35 years’ experience in the global resources sector. He has held directorships with several ASX, TSX, and LSE-listed companies.
